title: オーストラリア フィジーと同盟関係へ 中国に対抗か

title: ハマス ガザ地区の行政当局を解散と発表 先行きは不透明

title: 茂木外相 きょうからトルコ訪問 NATO関連行事など出席へ
snippet: 外務省は茂木外務大臣が6日からトルコを訪問すると発表しました。NATO＝北大西洋条約機構のルッテ事務総長との会合に高市総理大臣の代理として出席するほか、日米韓3か国の外相会談などが行われる見通しです。

title: Huge crowds fill Tehran streets for Khamenei's funeral procession
snippet: Many people were waving Iranian flags and red banners symbolising vengeance for the former supreme leader's war death.

title: Wildfire in southern France forces evacuation of 10,000 people

snippet: The decision to effectively overturn the red card shown to United States forward Folarin Balogun leaves many unanswered questions.

title: At least 25 killed in Sri Lanka prison riots
snippet: The two days of violence at Negombo Prison are the worst prison riots in the country in years.

title: Thousands of forgotten WW1 soldiers recognised for first time
snippet: Nearly 10,000 soldiers' names are being added to the official database of war dead, a cherished step for many of their descendants.
